task_completion.description: A terminal window is open and shows command activity
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal/console window is visible on screen with text output

task_completion.description: Evidence of REST API interaction (curl commands or API responses)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows curl commands with https://localhost:8443 or JSON/XML API responses

task_completion.description: Channel creation confirmed via API response or dashboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows a successful channel creation response (channel ID returned) or dashboard shows a channel entry
Terminal shows deployment command executed or dashboard shows channel in STARTED state
Browser shows NextGen Connect dashboard with channel name and status visible

integrity.description: NextGen Connect environment is properly running
integrity.visual_evidence: Firefox shows NextGen Connect landing page or dashboard, or terminal shows docker containers running

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an HL7 channel via REST API (curl commands to https://localhost:8443/api). Success is indicated by: (1) curl POST to /api/channels returning a channel ID, (2) deployment via POST to /api/channels/<id>/_deploy, (3) channel appearing in dashboard as STARTED. The web dashboard is monitoring-only so all creation must be done via terminal/curl.
